title: erysimum scabrum
intro: Erysimum scabrum, also known as wavy crested wallflower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-anxiety, and anti-depressant effects. Erysimum scabrum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use is not widely documented and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
